pages.text: $(bold)Apple Oak Seed$()$(br2)The fruiting oak. Trade a single apple for its seed; it grows the orchard oak.
pages.title: Apple Oak Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Make:$() a single $(italic)Apple$() → this seed.$(br2)$(bold)Plant$() it to grow the fruiting orchard oak, or $(bold)convert:$() + $(italic)Dirt$() → $(italic)Oak Sapling$().
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
